content_en:
If dying individuals have in their possession certain rights belonging to others, they should return them, if they are able to do so, in order to avoid having to pay them back from their good deeds on the Day of Judgement. The Prophet (r) warned his followers of this reality as follows: Щҗп»ӯЩ„ЩҸ пәҚп»ҹп» пұ п»Әо Ўпәҙо   п»—п№¶пәҺЩ„ЩҺ п»—п№¶пәҺЩ„ЩҺ пәӯо Ўп»Ёп№ҫп»Әо   п»Ӣо Ўп»ҖЩҗп»І пәҚп»ҹп» пұ п»Әо  пә“п№¶ пәӯо  пәӯо ўп»ҙо  пәӯо Ў пәғЩҺпә’Щҗп»І п»«о ўп»Ҙо  п»Ӣ r : )) о ўпә”п№І Щҗп»·ЩҺпәЁЩҗп»ҙп»ӘЩҗ п»ӨЩҗп»Ҙо  п»…п№ҫп» п№¶п»Өо   п»Өо Ў п»ңп№¶пәҺп»Ёп№¶пә•п№ҫ п»ҹп№¶п»Әо ўп»Ҙо  п»Ө о  п»Ўо ўп»ӯо   пәҚп»ҹп№ҫп»ҙо Ў п»ӨЩҗп»Ёп№ҫп»Әо Ўп» пұ п» п№ҫп»Әо  пәҳп№¶пәӨо  пәҖЩҚ п»“п№¶п» п№ҫп»ҙо ў пәёп№¶п»Іо ўп»ҖЩҗп»ӘЩҗ пәғЩҺп»ӯо ўп»ӢЩҗпәӯ Щ„ЩҢ о  п»Өо   п»Ӣо Ў п»ҹп№¶п»Әо   п»ңп№¶пәҺп»Ҙо ў пәҮЩҗп»Ҙо Өп»Ўо  п»«о ўп»»п№¶ пә©Щҗпәӯо   п»ӯо Ө пә©Щҗп»ҙп»Ёп№¶пәҺпәӯо  п»ңп№ёп»ӯп»Ҙо   п»»п№¶ п»ҙо ўЩ„ЩҺ пәғЩҺп»Ҙо ўп»—п№¶пә’ п»ӨЩҗЩ„ЩҺ о ЎпәҺпәӨЩҗпә’Щҗп»ӘЩҗ п»“п№¶пәӨо  пәҢЩҺпәҺпә•Щҗ пәјо ¬п»ҙо   пәҙо ўп»Ёп№¶пәҺпә•п№І пәғЩҸпәЁЩҗпә«п№¶ п»ӨЩҗп»Ҙо  пәҙо   пәӨо Ў п»ҹп№¶п»Әо ў пәҳп№¶п»ңп№ёп»Ҙо ў п»ҹп№¶п»Ўо ўпәҮЩҗп»Ҙо  пәҳЩҗп»ӘЩҗ п»ӯо  п»…п№ҫп» п№¶п»Өо  пәӯЩҗ п»Өо ў пә’Щҗп»ҳп№¶пә©о Ў пәғЩҸпәЁЩҗпә«п№¶ п»ӨЩҗп»Ёп№ҫп»Әо ӨпәҺп»ҹЩҗпәўо  пәј п»ӘЩҗо ўп» п№¶п»ҙо  п»Ӣ (( вҖңWhoever has with him a wrong taken from the honor of his brother Muslim or from his wealth, should return it before the Day of Judgement when neither dirham nor deenaar will be accepted; if he has righteous deeds, it will be taken from them, and if he doesnвҖҷt have righteous deeds, it will be taken from his friends bad deeds and put on him.вҖқ29 28 Sahih Al-Al-Al-Al-Al-Bukhari, vol.7, p.390, no. 575, Sahih Muslim, vol.4, p.1411 nos. 6480 & 6485, Sunan Abu Dawud, vol.2, p.884, no. 3102 and Mishkat Al-Masabih, vol.1, p.333. 29 Sahih Al-Al-Al-Al-Al-Bukhari, vol.3, p.377, no. 629 and Mishkat Al-Masabih, vol.2, p.1062.

If those that are dying are unable to pay back their debts, they should, at least, have the sincere intention to do so and should inform their relatives about their debts. Either, one of their relatives will repay their debts after their death, or the Prophet (r) will take responsibility for the debts. The Prophet (r) established the basic principle of divine accounting that if a person intends to do a good deed but is unable, they are rewarded by God for their intention. Consequently, he said, )) ШҢо Ўп»©о  пәҺпәҖо  п»Ёп№ҫп»ӯЩҗп»ұ п»—п№¶п»Җо  пәҺпә•п№¶ п»»п№¶ п»ҙо   п»Өо ўп»Ҙо  п»Өо  ШҢ п»ӯо Ўп»Әо ©п»ҹЩҗп»ҙо   п»“п№¶пә„ЩҺп»Ёп№¶пәҺ п»ӯо Ўп»©о  пәҺпәҖо  п»Ёп№ҫп»ӯЩҗп»ұ п»—п№¶п»Җо   п»ҙо  п»ӯо Ўп»«о  пәҺпә•п№¶ п»ӯо   п»Өо ўп»Ҙо  п»Ёп№¶пәҺп»ҘЩҗ ШҢ п»“п№¶п»Өо ўп»ҙо   пә©о Ўп»Ҙо ўп»ҙо ЁпәҚп№¶п»ҹпә© о Өп»Ўо  п»«о ўп»»п№¶ пә©Щҗпәӯо   п»ӯо ӨпәҢЩҗпә«ЩҚ пә©Щҗп»ҙп»Ёп№¶пәҺпәӯо  п»Өо ўп»ӯо   п»ҙо  пәұо ўп»Ёп№¶пәҺпәҳЩҗп»ӘЩҗШҢ п»ҹп№¶п»ҙо  пәҙо   пәӨо ўп»Ҙо  пә…Щ’пәЁп№¶пә«п№ё п»Өо Ў пәҚп»ҹпұ пә«Щҗп»ұ п»ҙо  п»“п№¶пә«п№¶пәҚп»ҷ (( вҖңThere are two types of debt : whoever dies intending to repay them, I will be responsible for them, and whoever dies with no intention to repay them, will have it taken from his good deeds. There will not be any deenaars or dirhams on that Day.вҖқ30
content_id:
Jika orang yang sekarat memiliki hak-hak orang lain dalam penguasaannya, hendaknya ia mengembalikannya selagi masih mampu, agar tidak harus membayarnya dengan amal kebaikan pada Hari Kiamat. Nabi п·ә memperingatkan para pengikutnya tentang kenyataan ini: Abu Hurairah meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah п·ә bersabda, "Siapa yang memiliki kezaliman kepada saudaranya Muslim, baik dari kehormatan maupun hartanya, hendaklah ia meminta penyelesaiannya hari ini sebelum tiba hari yang tidak ada dinar dan dirham; jika ia memiliki amal saleh, akan diambil dari amal salehnya sesuai kadar kezhalimannya, dan jika ia tidak memiliki amal saleh, maka akan diambil dari dosa-dosa kawannya dan dibebankan kepadanya."

Jika orang yang sekarat tidak mampu melunasi utangnya, setidaknya ia harus memiliki niat yang tulus untuk melakukannya dan memberitahu keluarganya tentang utang-utangnya. Salah satu keluarganya akan melunasi utang tersebut setelah kematiannya, atau Nabi п·ә akan bertanggung jawab atas utang itu. Nabi п·ә menetapkan prinsip dasar akuntansi ilahi bahwa jika seseorang berniat melakukan amal kebaikan namun tidak mampu, ia tetap mendapat pahala dari Allah atas niatnya. Oleh karena itu, beliau bersabda, "Ada dua jenis utang: siapa yang meninggal dengan berniat melunasinya, maka akulah yang bertanggung jawab atasnya; dan siapa yang meninggal tanpa berniat melunasinya, maka akan diambil dari amal kebaikannya. Tidak ada dinar maupun dirham pada hari itu."
